title: Cosmos Cosmic Snow — drifting glints with depth parallax
title_vi: Cosmos Cosmic Snow — đốm sáng rơi với chiều sâu thị sai
summary: Soft glints, snow and embers in Cosmos accent colours drift gently downward across three depth layers — far ones small, dim and slow, near ones big, bright and fast — building real parallax over the Phantom dark. Each glint twinkles and sways. Pure Canvas 2D, zero deps, runs offline; deterministic and seamless.
usage_notes: RUN: double-click index.html. KEY TECHNIQUES: three depth layers seeded with different size/brightness/speed scales (far=small/dim/slow, near=big/bright/fast) give parallax. Each glint has a seeded base x, phase, colour, sway harmonic and twinkle seed; progress p=((u*speed+phase) mod 1) drives downward travel and a horizontal sine sway on an integer harmonic, so it wraps seamlessly. Drawn as an additive 'lighter' radial halo plus a bright white core; twinkle modulates alpha via a sine of time. CAPTURE: ?auto=1 + window.__seek(t). TUNE: per-layer counts/scales in LAY, AC colours, LOOP.
summary_vi: Đốm sáng, tuyết và than hồng tông Cosmos rơi nhẹ qua ba lớp chiều sâu — lớp xa nhỏ/mờ/chậm, lớp gần to/sáng/nhanh — tạo thị sai thật trên nền Phantom tối. Mỗi đốm lấp lánh và đung đưa. Thuần Canvas 2D, không lib, chạy offline; deterministic & loop liền.
notes: Tuyết vũ trụ: 3 lớp parallax (xa nhỏ/mờ/chậm, gần to/sáng/nhanh); p=((u*sp+phase)mod1) → rơi xuống + sway sine (hài integer) → loop; halo additive + lõi trắng, lấp lánh bằng sine theo thời gian. B-tier.
